feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Antman and Red entered the Celadon Rocket Hideout through the Game Corner poster switch.

feed.speaker: Red
feed.text: Red held the entry stairs and warned that Rocket designed the hideout to split trainers from their support.

feed.speaker: Bill
feed.text: Bill traced a Silph Scope echo through the hideout elevator signal.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: The Rocket elevator requires a Lift Key before deeper access is possible.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: A Giovanni command terminal confirms Rocket expected Antman to follow the Silph Scope trail.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Team Moonlight interference is scraping Rocket's hideout signal, proving the custom faction war is inside Celadon too.

feed.speaker: WorldLink
feed.text: Rocket Hideout B1F is unlocked as the next Celadon dungeon step.
